title: Better Progression
description: Makes early game progression slightly more difficult
body:
**BETTER PROGRESSION**

This mod is intended to slightly draw out Minecraft's early game by making some simple processes slightly harder. Feel free to use this in modpacks and YouTube videos!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**HOW THE MOD WORKS:**


__________________________________
_Goal #1: Obtain a crafting table_

  Mine many logs, which drop sticks unless broken with an axe.
  
  Craft four sticks into a bundle of sticks.
  
  Craft four bundles of sticks into bundled planks.
  
  Craft four bundled planks into a crafting table.

________________________________________
_Goal #2: Obtain wooden and stone tools_

  Wooden tools are now crafted with bundles of sticks instead of planks.
  
  Stone and cobblestone, when mined with a wooden pickaxe, drop 1-2 rocks.
  
  Craft nine rocks into cobblestone.
  
  Stone tools can be crafted with stone only, meaning cobblestone has to be smelted.
  
  Craft eight cobblestone into a furnace.
  
  Obtain more cobblestone and smelt it.
  
  The resulting stone can be used to make stone tools!
  
  Stone and cobblestone, when mined with a stone pickaxe, drop 3-4 rocks.


____________________________
_Goal #3: Obtain iron tools_

  Iron ore drops 1-2 lumps of iron.
  
  Four lumps of iron can be crafted into raw iron.
  
  When raw iron is smelted in a furnace, the iron output is normal.
  
  When raw iron is smelted in a blast furnace, the iron output is doubled.
  
  This process also applies to gold.
  
  Stone and cobblestone, when mined with an iron pickaxe or better, drop themselves.

</details>
